heading: Application
label: 4101 Application
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource section (U.S. Code)410146:526uSection 4101 makes this chapter applicable to uninspected vessels, as defined in section 2101(43), that operate on the navigable waters of the United States or that are owned in the United States and while operating on the high seas. Therefore a vessel that operates on waters that are considered to be solely State waters would not be subject to these Federal requirements.
Amendments1988— inserted “not subject to chapter 45 of this title” after “an uninspected vessel”.Pub. L. 100–424
Effective DateChapter effective , see , set out as a note under .Apr. 15, 1984section 2(g)(1) of Pub. L. 98–89section 3101 of this title
amendments: Amendments1988— inserted “not subject to chapter 45 of this title” after “an uninspected vessel”.Pub. L. 100–424
